shell.cmdkHint: Press ⌘K to open the command palette

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Local config · localStorage · takes effect immediately

general.title: General
general.hint: Global behaviour, mostly takes effect immediately
general.openMainHint: When on, the chat window expands automatically; off keeps it in the tray
general.desktopNotifyHint: Fires a desktop notification on every agent → system reply
general.failureHint: Cascading behaviour when one agent in a spell fails
general.killOthersHint: When on, any agent shim_exit != 0 kills every other agent in the spell

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.hint: Switch light / dark / system instantly; preference persisted in localStorage
